---
title: "Research"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

# 

My research spans microbial ecology across extreme environments, combining molecular biology, environmental DNA, bioinformatics and ecological theory to understand how microbial communities respond to environmental change.

---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column}

## ❄ Arctic Marine Ecology

Understanding how microbial communities respond to seasonality and environmental change across Arctic fjords using long-term environmental DNA datasets.

[Explore this project →](arctic.qmd)

:::

::: {.column}


## ❄ Benthic Ecology

Exploring deep-sea Arctic ecosystems and how methane cold seeps shape benthic biodiversity, habitat complexity and ecosystem functioning. 

[Explore this project →](benthic.qmd)

:::
::::
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column}


## 🌱 Sustainable Agriculture

Exploring beneficial microbial communities associated with crops and sustainable agriculture.

[Explore this project →](plants.qmd)

:::


::: {.column}


## 💻 Bioinformatics

Reproducible analyses in R, Python and high-performance computing.

[Explore this project →](bioinformatics.qmd)

:::

::::
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column}


## 🚀 Space Biology

Plant microbiomes and microbial ecology for future lunar and Martian agriculture.

[Explore this project →](space.qmd)

:::

::: {.column}


## 🎓 Outreach

Field teaching and science communication.

[Explore this project →](outreach.qmd)

:::

::::
